DEVELOPMENT NOTICE // 001

Abyss Realms Is Still Being Built

Abyss Realms is currently in active development. Environments, characters, interfaces, abilities, enemies, progression systems, and other elements shown on this website may be changed, redesigned, replaced, or removed before release.

SUBJECT
TO CHANGE
01

THE WORLD BELOW

About Abyss Realms

Abyss Realms is an upcoming open-world dark-fantasy Roblox experience built around exploration, combat, discovery, and progression. Players will travel across mysterious islands and broken realms, face powerful enemies, unlock new abilities, complete quests, and gradually uncover the history of a world consumed by the Abyss.

02

WORLD ARCHIVE

Enter the Realms

DEVELOPMENT LEAK · WIP

FIRST KNOWN SEA

Realm of the Mist

The first known sea of Abyss Realms—a collection of mysterious islands hidden beneath endless mist. Ancient structures, dangerous creatures, unexplored territories, and forgotten secrets wait beyond the fog.
